exact_cause: The mandatory 15:10 CT flatten mask was implemented as every local time after 15:10, instead of the bounded 15:10-to-17:00 close interval. Overnight opportunities therefore exited on their entry bar.
economic_consequence: All v1 FX pass, PnL, target-progress, MLL and tier counts are non-promotional and must not be interpreted.
repair_scope: Session close mask only; candidate grammar, temporal roles, costs, account rules and acquired data remain unchanged.
